query:
INSERT INTO reminders (lectureId, email, reminderSent24h, reminderSent1h) 
SELECT id, 'ALALAWI2@SQU.EDU.OM', 0, 0 
FROM lectures 
WHERE title LIKE '%Beyond PubMed%' 
LIMIT 1;
